page.title: Properties
page.description: Manage the property inventory from this section.

sectionDescriptions.services: Amenities and services available in the property.

identity.title: Identity
identity.hint: Visible in listings and search results.

propertyType.label: Property type
propertyType.hint: Select a single type for the property.
propertyType.error: Property types could not be loaded.

modality.label: Modality
modality.hint: Select a single modality for the listing.

propertyDetails.title: Characteristics
propertyDetails.hint: Complete the required attributes according to the selected property type.

services.title: Services
services.hint: Choose the amenities available in the property.

clauses.title: Clauses
clauses.hint: Define the conditions and restrictions for the property.

multimedia.title: Photos
multimedia.hint: Add between 1 and 10 photos of the property. The first one will be the cover by default.

map.title: Map
map.hint: Select the exact property point on the map.

fields.title: Address
fields.hint: Complete or adjust the property's base location details.

extras.title: Additional details
extras.description: Lot area is now captured inside the property details section so the main property measurements stay together.

unselected.title: Select a property type first
unselected.description: We need to know whether the property is residential, commercial, or another type to show the proper fields.

other.title: This type does not require a specific block
other.description: You can continue without capturing residential or commercial attributes for this property type.

residential.title: Residential details
residential.hint: Complete the layout and physical conditions of the residential property.

commercial.title: Commercial details
commercial.hint: Complete the operational and technical setup of the commercial property.

coverImage.hint: PNG or JPG, one main image.

locationMap.label: Map
locationMap.hint: Click or drag the marker to set the exact property location.
locationMap.selectionHint: We will use the user's current location when available; otherwise, the map starts in Mexico City.

municipality.label: Municipality
municipality.searching: Searching for matches in more municipalities...

neighborhood.label: Neighborhood
neighborhood.placeholder: Ex: Downtown, Del Valle Norte, or Las Palmas neighborhood

street.label: Street
street.placeholder: Ex: Insurgentes Sur Ave. or Morelos Street

isFurnished.label: Furnished
isFurnished.description: Indicates whether the property is delivered with furniture.

threePhasePower.label: Three-phase power
threePhasePower.description: Enable if the property has a three-phase electrical installation.

landUse.label: Land use
landUse.placeholder: Ex: Commercial, mixed-use, or light industrial

isPublicAddress.label: Show public address
isPublicAddress.description: Expose the exact address in the listing.

modalitiesDescriptions.sale: List the property for sale only.
modalitiesDescriptions.rent: List the property for rent only.
modalitiesDescriptions.mixed: Allow the property to be offered for both sale and rent.

pricing.emptyStateDescription: The modality defines whether we will capture sale, rent, or both price types.
pricing.propertyTypeRequiredDescription: We need the property type to know which rent periods are available.
pricing.loadingDescription: We are fetching the allowed rent types for this property.
pricing.noPeriodsDescription: We could not find configured rent periods for the selected property type.
pricing.selectorHint: Click a row to choose which amount you want to edit.
pricing.registeredHint: Summary of the amounts captured so far for this property.
pricing.tableEmpty: You have not entered prices for this property yet.
pricing.editorHint: Edit the amount for the price type that is currently selected.
pricing.negotiableDescription: Enable this option if the sale price can be negotiated.
pricing.salePreviewHint: This amount will be sent as the sale price if you keep a value in this tab.
pricing.rentPreviewHint: This amount will be sent only for this rent period if you leave a captured value.

services.selectedHint: Click an amenity to remove it from the property.
services.selectedEmpty: You have not selected amenities yet.
services.availableHint: Click an amenity to add it to the property.
services.availableEmpty: There are no more available amenities.

clauses.availableHint: Clauses you can enable for this property.
clauses.selectedHint: Active clauses and their current value.

multimedia.uploaderHint: Add new property photos from your device.
multimedia.editorHint: Select a photo to edit its cover status, label, and alt text.
multimedia.editorEmptyHint: Add at least one photo to organize it and complete its metadata.
multimedia.labelPlaceholder: Ex: Front facade or main kitchen
multimedia.altPlaceholder: Briefly describe what appears in the photo
multimedia.errorType: Some files were rejected due to unsupported format.
multimedia.errorSize: Some files exceed the {{maxMb}} MB limit.
multimedia.errorMax: You can only add {{max}} photos in total.

location.latitudeInvalid: Select a valid latitude coordinate on the map.
location.longitudeInvalid: Select a valid longitude coordinate on the map.
location.postalCodeInvalid: Postal code must be numeric and cannot exceed 5 digits.
location.exteriorNumberInvalid: Exterior number only allows letters, numbers, hyphen, and #, with a maximum of 8 characters.
location.interiorNumberInvalid: Interior number only allows letters, numbers, hyphen, and #, with a maximum of 8 characters.
location.lotAreaInvalid: Lot area must be a valid numeric value.

details.lotAreaInvalid: Lot area must be a number greater than 0 with up to 2 decimals.
details.bedroomsInvalid: Bedrooms must be a whole number greater than or equal to 0.
details.bathroomsInvalid: Bathrooms must be a whole number greater than or equal to 0.
details.bedsInvalid: Beds must be a whole number greater than or equal to 0.
details.floorsInvalid: Floors must be a whole number greater than or equal to 0.
details.parkingSpotsInvalid: Parking spots must be a whole number greater than or equal to 0.
details.builtAreaInvalid: Built area must be a number greater than 0 with up to 2 decimals.
details.builtAreaExceedsLotArea: Built area cannot exceed lot area.
details.constructionYearInvalid: Construction year must be a whole number greater than 0.
details.ceilingHeightInvalid: Ceiling height must be a number greater than 0 with up to 2 decimals.
details.loadingDocksInvalid: Loading docks must be a whole number greater than or equal to 0.
details.internalOfficesInvalid: Internal offices must be a whole number greater than or equal to 0.

pricing.rentPeriodRequired: Enable at least one rent period.
pricing.rentPriceRequired: All enabled rent periods must have a price.
pricing.depositRequired: All enabled rent periods must have a deposit, even if it is 0.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel registration
cancelDialog.body: If you leave now, you will lose the unsaved changes for this property.

servicesEmptyDialog.title: Continue without services
servicesEmptyDialog.body: You have not selected amenities or services for this property yet. Showing them on the public listing helps the property look more complete, attractive, and easier for users to compare. You can continue without them if you prefer to add them later.

clausesEmptyDialog.title: Continue without clauses
clausesEmptyDialog.body: You have not enabled any clauses for this property. You can continue and configure them later if needed.

toast.successDescription: The registration is complete and the photos were uploaded successfully.
toast.errorTitle: We could not complete the registration

states.empty: There are no properties to display.
states.emptyTitle: There are no registered properties yet
states.emptyDescription: Once you register the first property, it will appear here so you can manage it.
states.emptySelectionDescription: Select at least one property type to see results in this view.
states.loadErrorTitle: We could not load the properties

deleteDialog.title: Delete property
deleteDialog.bodyWithoutTitle: This action will delete the property and it cannot be undone.
